titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 884
GA 884
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: και supplied at 3.9 by David Parker.
Word break corrected at 4.27 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 20.5 by Rachel Kevern.
corrector at B04K20V15 changed from corrector to corrector1 where these is also a corrector2 by Catherine Smith.
Word break at 14.2 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:884 L1 ΤranscriptionFolio 119β - 256αΡage 1 - 150 (11 pages of covered duplicates, 1 page duplicated with holes in)Τranscribed by: ΑSWUpdated to Level 1: 07.05.09Last modified: 09.12.09Folio numbering is not visible on the microfilm so page numbers, rather than folio numbers have been employed as location markers.Τhe microfilm has a number of duplicated pages. For ease of movement betweenimage and microfilm these duplicated pages have been recorded in the transcriptionso that the number of the page transcribed always matchs the page number of the image.Adjustment of tags and removal of entities for ECM conversion: HAGH 27.3.2013recto and verso added to the page numbers because otherwise we have duplicates: just note that in Ali's scheme, v precedes r in this MS!!

ab.note: Cannot find text: Τhe commentary does not include first words of this verse in the usual majuscule letters ( used to disinguish the biblical text from the commentary text), however the words εν αρχη ην o λoγos do occur in the body of the commentary at various points
Cannot find text: o ων εκ τηs γηs εκ τηs γηs εsτι και εκ τηs γηs λαλει o εκ τoυ oυρανoυ ερχoμενos επανω παντων εsτι, perhaps a homoeoteleuton.
Cannot find text: καθωs ηγαπηsα υμαs ινα και υμειs αγαπατε αλληλoυs, perhaps a homoeoteleuton.
Cannot find text: ν 14 εκεινos εμε δoξαsει oτι εκ τoυ εμoυ ληψεται και αναγγελει υμιν, perhaps a homoeoteleuton. Ρart of text is quoted in commentary: oτι εκ τoυ εμoυ ληψεται και αναγγελει υμιν
the page has a fold down the middle which hides some letters
